37. Dealing with the mischief rule, this Court in Steel Authority of India 
Ltd. & Ors. v. National Union Waterfront Workers & Ors., (2001) 
7 SCC 1 held as under:-
“66. For a proper examination of these issues, a reference 
to Section 10 which provides for prohibition of employment 
of contract labour and clauses (b), (c), (e), (g) and (i) 
of Section 2(1) of the CLRA Act which define the terms 
“contract labour”, “contractor”, “establishment”, “principal 
employer” and “workman” respectively will be apposite. To 
interpret these and other relevant provisions of the CLRA 
Act, to which reference will be made presently, we may, 
with advantage, refer to Craies on Statute Law [ 6th Edn., 
by S.G.G. Edgar, p. 96] quoting the following observation
